title: Defenders of the Ancient 2
description: Adds items from Defender of the Ancient 2
body:
**NO UPDATES, THE ORIGINAL FILES WERE LOST**
NEW MOD UNDER WORK
_!!!Mod has many bugs and mistakes,better not to play with it before next patch!!!
This mod works only on 1.20.1 minecraft forge version.
A fun-made mod.Adds items from Defender of the Ancient 2 such as:
1. Blink dagger.
2. Heart of tarrasque(basilisk).
3. Skull basher.
4. Radiance.
5. Hand of midas.

And more!
You can get these items from merchant,what can be summoned by placing enchanting table near villager without job.
You can upgrade some of these items by forger,what can be summoned by placing anvil near villager without job.
Mod supports only english language(with some grammar mistakes)
Mod **will get** updates in future.
If you got ideas for mod or want to report mistakes,feel free to** join my discord server**.
File of the mod named " alchemism & magics "  because its the first idea for mod.Will be reworked in future._
